meta.name: Auto Loan Calculator
meta.description: Industrial-grade auto loan calculator with total cost of ownership, risk-adjusted payment analysis, and hidden loss drivers. Compliant with ISO 18435, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC financial metrics.

inputs.label: Vehicle Price (MSRP + Fees)
inputs.businessContext: Total negotiated price including destination, dealer fees, and taxes before down payment.

inputs.label: Down Payment
inputs.businessContext: Initial cash payment reducing loan principal.

inputs.label: Trade-In Value
inputs.businessContext: Value of vehicle traded in, applied to reduce principal.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Nominal annual percentage rate (APR) offered by lender.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of loan in months. Standard terms: 36, 48, 60, 72, 84.

inputs.label: Credit Score
inputs.businessContext: FICO score used to adjust risk premium and interest rate.

inputs.label: Monthly Gross Income
inputs.businessContext: Pre-tax monthly income for debt-to-income ratio calculation.

inputs.label: Existing Monthly Debt Payments
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all other monthly debt obligations (credit cards, student loans, etc.).

inputs.label: Monthly Insurance Premium
inputs.businessContext: Estimated monthly auto insurance cost for the vehicle.

inputs.label: Monthly Fuel Cost
inputs.businessContext: Estimated monthly fuel expense based on mileage and fuel efficiency.

inputs.label: Monthly Maintenance & Repairs
inputs.businessContext: Average monthly cost for routine maintenance, tires, and unexpected repairs.

inputs.label: Annual Depreciation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual depreciation as percentage of vehicle value. Industry average 15-20%.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: State and local sales tax applied to vehicle purchase price.

inputs.label: Annual Registration Fee
inputs.businessContext: Yearly vehicle registration and license plate fees.

rules.message: Down payment must be less than vehicle price.
Loan amount must be positive after down payment and trade-in.
Credit score below 580 may result in loan denial or high APR.
Terms over 72 months increase negative equity risk.

thresholds.message: Monthly payment exceeds 15% of gross income. Consider lower-priced vehicle.
Risk of negative equity after 3 years. Consider larger down payment.
Total cost of ownership exceeds 130% of purchase price. Evaluate alternatives.

formulas.name: Loan Principal
formulas.description: Amount financed after down payment and trade-in.

formulas.name: Monthly Interest Rate
formulas.description: Annual rate converted to monthly decimal.

formulas.name: Monthly Loan Payment
formulas.description: Standard amortizing payment using PMT formula.

formulas.name: Total Interest Over Loan Term
formulas.description: Sum of all interest payments over the loan life.

formulas.name: Total Monthly Operating Cost
formulas.description: Sum of loan payment, insurance, fuel, maintenance, and registration.

formulas.name: Total 5-Year Cost of Ownership
formulas.description: All costs over 5 years including depreciation, interest, and operating costs.

formulas.name: Debt-to-Income Ratio
formulas.description: Percentage of gross income going to debt payments.

primary.label: Estimated Monthly Payment
primary.description: Primary result: monthly loan payment based on inputs.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Depreciation Impact
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Hidden loss from vehicle value decline over 5 years.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Opportunity Cost of Down Payment
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Lost investment return if down payment were invested at 5% annual return.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Insurance Premium Inflation
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated 3% annual increase in insurance costs over 5 years.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Down Payment
suggestedActions.description: Raising down payment to 20% reduces loan amount and interest.
suggestedActions.impact: Reduces monthly payment by ~$X and total interest by ~$Y.

suggestedActions.label: Shorten Loan Term to 48 Months
suggestedActions.description: Shorter term reduces total interest but increases monthly payment.
suggestedActions.impact: Saves ~$Z in interest over loan life.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Credit Score to 740+
suggestedActions.description: Higher score may qualify for lower APR (e.g., 4.5% vs 6.5%).
suggestedActions.impact: Reduces monthly payment by ~$A and total interest by ~$B.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Operating Costs
suggestedActions.description: Consider fuel-efficient vehicle, shop insurance, DIY maintenance.
suggestedActions.impact: Lowers total monthly operating cost by ~$C.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Confidence-Adjusted Monthly Payment
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Monthly payment adjusted for credit score uncertainty. Higher score = lower adjustment.
